tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Able To.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Able To का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: I am able to do this work. She is able to run fast. I was able to complete this yesterday. We will be able to finish this by tomorrow. He was able to solve this problem.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Able To.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Able To का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Are you able to understand this? I was able to learn this. They will be able to achieve this target. We are able to work together. He was not able to swim before.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "क्या तुम इसे समय पर कर पाओगे?"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Will you be able to do this on time?

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "We will be able to finish this by tomorrow yesterday."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: We will be able to finish this by tomorrow.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Able To.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Able To का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: She is able to learn any language. We were able to correct our mistake. They will be able to get this opportunity. I was not able to understand this before.
